name: Don DeMicheal
abstract: Donald Anthony DeMicheal (May 12, 1928 – February 4, 1982) was an American jazz percussionist, bandleader, music journalist, music critic, and magazine editor.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Goin' to Chicago

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: Don was somebody from whom – I had pretty much been on my own in both my editorial positions... Don was somebody I learned a good deal from. He was an excellent editor
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: He along with Don DeMicheal, who died many years ago, were among the people that I respected most as writers
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
